$schema_note: Zava demo Databricks config. Copy to databricks_config.json (gitignored) and replace <PLACEHOLDER> tokens. NO secrets: the PAT/SP secret is acquired at runtime (az login / Key Vault), never stored here. Validate with: python scripts/config_schema.py --validate fabric/config/deploy_config.sample.json databricks/config/databricks_config.sample.json

workspace._comment: Fresh path (use_existing=false) provisions the workspace via Bicep (Step 6). To bring your own workspace, set use_existing=true and fill host_url + resource_id with real values; Step 6 is then skipped.
